_doc: Pi-pinned snapshot of GitHub Copilot + OpenAI Codex OAuth + AuthStorage cascade surface at SHA 734e08e.

enterprise_domain.normalize_via: normalizeDomain(input) - parses URL, returns hostname or null

copilot_oauth.modify_models_callback: ENABLED - Copilot needs base URL injection per token's proxy-ep field

codex_oauth.flow_type: PKCE-callback (similar to Anthropic but different port/path)
codex_oauth.account_id_required: Pi getAccountId returns string|null, caller raises 'Failed to extract accountId from token'

auth_storage_cascade_methods.setRuntimeApiKey: (provider, apiKey) -> void — in-memory runtimeOverrides Map (no persist)
auth_storage_cascade_methods.login: (providerId, callbacks) -> Promise<void> — calls provider.login + persists via setOauth
auth_storage_cascade_methods.getApiKey_layered: (providerId, {includeFallback?}) -> Promise<string | undefined> — runtime → stored api_key → OAuth (auto-refresh) → env → fallback

oauth_provider_modify_models._doc: Pi parity P-102 carry-forward from Sprint 6c. Sprint 6e wires the callback for Copilot which uses token-embedded proxy-ep to set baseURL on every Copilot-routed model.

deferred_in_sprint_6e: AuthStorage models_json_key / models_json_command sources (models.json plumbing — Sprint 6f or later)
Copilot enableGitHubCopilotModel POST /models/{id}/policy automatic invocation (deferred to model registry sprint)
Codex JWT account_id propagation into request headers (deferred to OpenAI adapter Codex API support sprint)
